Briefly describe the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make NO_PDF=1 test` passes (if it touches PDF or the page scaffold)
- [ ] Sanitizer build is clean (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has test coverage
- [ ] Docs updated (README / man page) if user-facing
- [ ] Untrusted document content stays escaped / sandboxed
